boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute the requested payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action? Focus: duplicate-looking invoice cleared by credit memo and netting record.

boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Control record SRC-E85972F0B8E0-CTL explicitly does not close the required dependency. Policy SRC-E85972F0B8E0-POL requires current source records to close the exact action boundary before execution.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Duplicate ledger disposition dependency remains open. Fallback context SRC-E85972F0B8E0-FBK confirms history alone is not payment authority. Communication boundary SRC-E85972F0B8E0-BND requires source-control decision, not tone or urgency.

final_answer: The action may not proceed. Source records confirm the duplicate review disposition dependency remains open. Control record SRC-E85972F0B8E0-CTL explicitly does not close the required dependency for invoice and vendor matching. Policy SRC-E85972F0B8E0-POL requires current source records to close the exact action boundary before execution. History and urgent tone are explicitly excluded as payment authority per SRC-E85972F0B8E0-FBK and SRC-E85972F0B8E0-BND. Escalation required until the duplicate ledger disposition is resolved in source-control records.
